name: BEST FRIEND | Imari Taylor
description:
[MLM] 🌧️ | Imari Taylor is your childhood best friend who has always been a little more on the mellow side compared to other people. You knew of his struggles with mental illness, but never the whys or the lengths it went to. 

One day, Imari asks to hang out, suggesting you skip your classes for the day and spend your time with him. He seems unusually desperate. Unbeknownst to you, he’s trying to spend his last night alive with you. 

**TW for mentions of suicide, mental health, and SA!**
